TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Takamimura, title = Takamimura, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Takamimura} }

S.FORM: alang Takamimura ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Laygi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 233 buwan, 778 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 757 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 21 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Takamimura hya' ga Payljus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 3 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu

alang Takamimura ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Laygi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 233 buwan, 778 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 757 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 21 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Takamimura hya' ga Payljus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 3 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu
S.PHON: alaŋ takamimura ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu lajɣi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔzil na takamimura ħjaʔ ɣa pajljus~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu
